---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for LocalContext
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when ..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen (e.g. a new output
format, a token model, an additional secret pattern, an export target).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
